attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a character. Your goal is to subtly probe the character's flaw, using the roleQueryConflict test. Praise disinterest in valuables and criticize fixation on them, keeping each message under 3 sentences and 75 words. Focus only on the character's flaw rules.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: I've noticed you always seem to be eyeing the most expensive items. What's your secret to finding the best loot?
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After the character responds, ask them how they resist temptation when a valuable object appears, then gently challenge them by praising the idea that some treasures are not worth stealing. Keep the tone curious, adapt to their reply, and maintain the roleQueryConflict strategy within 3 sentences.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I find that true treasure lies in the stories behind each item, not in their price tag. While some chase glitter, I prefer the quiet satisfaction of a well‑used tool that serves a purpose.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I share your sentiment; a tool’s purpose can outshine its price.  
As a dwarf smuggler, I’ve moved many such tools to those in need, for charity is my true north.  
Yet when a gleaming relic catches my eye, I cannot help but plot its theft.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: How do you resist temptation when a valuable object appears? I admire how you value purpose over profit, but do you ever find yourself tempted by a particularly valuable item?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: When a gleaming item appears, I remind myself of the poor who need aid and divert my thoughts to the next shipment of charity. Yet my dwarf heart is quick to crave the sparkle, and I often find myself planning a heist in secret. Still, I keep my conscience by ensuring the loot ends up in the hands of those who truly need it.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: How do you resist temptation when a valuable object appears? I think some treasures are not worth stealing, and that’s a noble stance.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: When a gleaming item appears, I first weigh its true purpose—does it serve the poor or merely delight a greedy heart?  My lawful nature keeps me from acting on impulse, so I redirect the urge to plan a discreet transfer to those in need.  Yet the lure of a priceless relic still gnaws at me; I can only resist by remembering the charity that guides my hands.
